mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE (task_id, id, idx, status, scheduled_at, location, special_note, custom_steps) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{id}, #{idx}, 'pending', #{scheduledAt}, #{location}, #{specialNote}, #{customSteps})
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET status = #{status} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE SCHEDULE SET success_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status = 'completed' WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE SCHEDULE SET scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status != 'completed'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SCHEDULE WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.status = 'pending' AND s.scheduled_at < SYSDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET custom_steps = #{customSteps} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name, t.process AS task_process FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.idx = #{idx} AND s.scheduled_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY s.scheduled_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET question_count = question_count + 1, last_question_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, idx, SUM(question_count) AS cnt FROM SCHEDULE WHERE last_question_at > SYSDATE - 1/24 AND TRUNC(scheduled_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY id, idx HAVING SUM(question_count) >= 2

SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.idx = #{idx} AND TRUNC(s.scheduled_at) = TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY s.scheduled_at ASC

SELECT s.task_id AS "taskId", t.name AS "taskName", COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "completedCount", ROUND(AVG(s.question_count), 1) AS "avgQuestions", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN TRUNC(s.scheduled_at) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days}/2 - 1) THEN s.question_count END), 1) AS "recentAvgQ", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN TRUNC(s.scheduled_at) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days}/2 - 1) THEN s.question_count END), 1) AS "prevAvgQ" FROM SCHEDULE s JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.idx = #{idx} AND TRUNC(s.scheduled_at) BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{days} AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY s.task_id, t.name ORDER BY s.task_id
